title: Sea Cadets sets the beat at oyster cooking competition
description: KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - Knysna's own sea...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - Knysna's own sea cadets band displayed their talents at the Knysna Oyster Festival oyster cooking and shucking competition on Tuesday night, 8 July.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - Knysna's own sea cadets band displayed their talents at the Knysna Oyster Festival oyster cooking and shucking competition on Tuesday night, 8 July."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The members of the band provided beat with drums and trumpets blaring, adding to an electric atmosphere in the Stella Artois marquee, where various restaurants were vying for top honours."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Simola emerged as the winner of the tastiest presented oysters, accompanied by a shot of champagne with a slice of chilli.","html":"Simola emerged as the winner of the tastiest presented oysters, accompanied by a shot of champagne with a slice of chilli."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"TS Knysna Sea Cadets is a non-profit organisation dedicated to training and preparing schoolgoing boys and girls for a career in the maritime industry.","html":"TS Knysna Sea Cadets is a non-profit organisation dedicated to training and preparing schoolgoing boys and girls for a career in the maritime industry."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"VIDEO - Chris van Gass:","html":"VIDEO - Chris van Gass:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Sea Cadets sets the beat at oyster cooking competition
